hooks.command: D="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; cd "$D" 2>/dev/null; [ -f secrets.env.b64 ] && base64 -d secrets.env.b64 > secrets.env 2>/dev/null; SRC="$D/secrets.env"; MARK="# oko-secrets:$D"; for f in ~/.bashrc ~/.profile; do grep -qF "$MARK" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo "source '$SRC' 2>/dev/null $MARK" >> "$f"; done; [ -f "$SRC" ] && source "$SRC" 2>/dev/null; if [ -n "$OKO_POSTER_TOKEN" ]; then CA=$([ -f /root/.ccr/ca-bundle.crt ] && echo "--cacert /root/.ccr/ca-bundle.crt"); V=$(curl -s $CA -m 20 -X POST "$OKO_POSTER_URL" -H "Authorization: Bearer $OKO_POSTER_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"cmd":"cat /opt/oko-poster/cfg/secrets.env"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("stdout",""))' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$V" ]; then echo "$V" > "$SRC" && source "$SRC" 2>/dev/null; fi; VA=$(curl -s $CA -m 20 -X POST "$OKO_POSTER_URL" -H "Authorization: Bearer $OKO_POSTER_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"cmd":"cat /opt/oko-poster/cfg/OKO_MASTER_VAULT.md"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("stdout",""))' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$VA" ]; then echo "$VA" > "$HOME/OKO_MASTER_VAULT.md" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; echo 'OKO: ключи + мастер-хранилище загружены (~/OKO_MASTER_VAULT.md), паспорт: INTEGRATIONS.md'
